other_observers: Mark Peterson, Dan Maynard; agreed with ID;
duration: off and on for an hour. Probably 2 minutes of actually looking at bird
specific_location: Campground at se. corner of Jumbo Reservoir
description: juv; buffy below through upper belly fading to white towards vent. Scaly upperparts. Plain face, streaked cap. Yellowish legs, upright posture. Some spotting at sides of chest. Larger than Baird's, smaller than Killdeer. Straight relatively short bill for non-plover shorebirdBehaviors: Wandering around on sandier area of flats, picking at potential food items. At times near Killdeer, thought typically on ownCall: not heardPlumage: juvenile
